# Story 2.4: Cart Panel + Line Items + Discount + Item Note

Status: done

<!-- Generated by bmad-create-story workflow on 2026-05-13. -->

## Story

As a cashier,
I want xem giỏ hàng cố định bên phải với danh sách line items, có thể chỉnh số lượng/xóa item/sửa ghi chú và áp dụng giảm giá toàn đơn,
so that tôi có thể kiểm tra và điều chỉnh đơn hàng trước checkout mà không mất ngữ cảnh giao dịch.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. **Cart store contract hoàn chỉnh:** Given cart store trong `pos-web/src/features/orders/cart-store.ts`, when developer mở store, then state có `{ items: CartItem[], discount: { type: 'fixed'|'percentage', value: number } | null }`; actions `addItem`, `updateQuantity`, `removeItem`, `updateItemNote`, `setDiscount`, `clearCart`, `resetCart`; `CartItem` schema giữ snapshot `{ tempId, productId, productNameSnapshot, unitPriceSnapshot, options: [{ optionId, labelSnapshot, priceDeltaSnapshot }], note?, quantity, lineTotal }`.
2. **Empty CartPanel state:** Given CartPanel (UX-DR8) bên phải POS, when `items.length === 0`, then hiển thị `<EmptyState />` với copy `Chọn món để bắt đầu đơn.` và illustration nhẹ; nút `Hoàn tất` disabled.
3. **Line item display/editing:** Given cart có items, when CartPanel render, then mỗi line item hiển thị tên sản phẩm bold, options ngắn gọn (vd `Size L, ít đá, +trân châu`), ghi chú italic nếu có, quantity stepper `− / số / +`, nút xoá `X`, và `lineTotal` format bằng `formatVnd()`.
4. **Quantity/remove behavior:** Given cashier dùng stepper, when bấm `+` hoặc `−`, then quantity cập nhật với min 1 và `lineTotal = quantity * (unitPriceSnapshot + sum(priceDeltaSnapshot))`; when giảm xuống 0/remove last item then item bị xoá; when bấm nút xoá trên item quantity > 1 then hiện confirm dialog trước khi xoá toàn bộ line.
5. **Inline item note:** Given cashier bấm icon edit ghi chú trên line item, when nhập/cập nhật note, then `updateItemNote(tempId, note)` lưu tối đa 200 ký tự, trim note rỗng thành undefined, render note bằng text React thường (không `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`).
6. **Discount control:** Given DiscountControl (UX-DR14), when cashier chọn `Giảm tiền cố định` hoặc `Giảm theo %`, then input chỉ nhận số nguyên; fixed là integer VND không vượt subtotal; percentage là integer 0-100; validation rõ bằng text không chỉ màu.
7. **Totals calculation:** Given cart có discount, when subtotal recalculate, then `subtotal = sum(lineTotal)`; `discountAmount = fixed ? value : floor(subtotal * value / 100)`; `total = subtotal - discountAmount`; tổng tiền hiển thị qua `formatVnd()`, font 28-36px bold, KHÔNG decimal; cập nhật tức thì <100ms.
8. **Menu sync snapshot safety:** Given menu được cập nhật background ở Epic 3, when menu sync xảy ra, then cart KHÔNG bị reset và line items tiếp tục dùng snapshot fields; product/menu data mới không mutate cart đang xử lý.
9. **Store unit tests:** Given unit test cart store, when test operations, then cover add same product/options 2 lần (tăng quantity), add same product khác note/options tạo line riêng, remove last item, apply/remove discount, fixed vượt subtotal bị reject/clamp an toàn, percentage >100 bị reject.
10. **Regression gates:** Required frontend gates pass and are recorded: `cd pos-web && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build`; security regression scan vẫn không có `localStorage`, `sessionStorage`, `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` trong app source.

## Tasks / Subtasks

- [x] Inspect and preserve current Story 2.3 POS/cart seam (AC: 1-8)
  - [x] Read `pos-web/src/features/orders/cart-store.ts`, `pos-web/src/features/orders/types.ts`, `pos-web/src/routes/pos/pos-shell.tsx`, `pos-web/src/routes/pos/pos-shell.test.tsx`, and `pos-web/src/features/menu/components/option-modal.tsx` before editing.
  - [x] Preserve product grid/category/search, OptionModal add-to-cart flow, route alert, mobile unsupported copy, two-column landscape layout, and current UUID v7 `tempId` generation.
- [x] Complete cart store + types (AC: 1,4,5,7,8,9)
  - [x] Extend `CartItem.quantity` from literal `1` to `number` and add `CartDiscount` type `{ type: 'fixed' | 'percentage'; value: number }`.
  - [x] Keep `features/orders/cart-store.ts` as the source of order/cart semantics; do not move cart into `shared/` unless a later architecture decision explicitly requires it.
  - [x] Implement `updateQuantity(tempId, quantity)`, `removeItem(tempId)`, `updateItemNote(tempId, note)`, `setDiscount(discount)`, `clearCart()`, `resetCart()`.
  - [x] Implement merge behavior in `addItem`: same `productId`, same option snapshot set/order, same normalized note, and same unit price should increment quantity instead of adding duplicate line; different note/options must create separate line.
  - [x] Recompute `lineTotal` from immutable snapshots only; never look up live product/menu data after item creation.
  - [x] Ensure `resetCart()` clears items and discount; `clearCart()` may alias reset for this story unless later checkout needs a softer clear.
- [x] Build CartPanel UI (AC: 2,3,4,5,7,8)
  - [x] Create `pos-web/src/features/orders/components/cart-panel.tsx` (or `routes/pos/cart-panel.tsx` only if keeping it route-local is simpler; prefer feature component for reuse by checkout stories).
  - [x] Use existing `<EmptyState />`, `formatVnd()`, and existing Button/Input primitives; avoid adding a new UI library.
  - [x] Render line item name/options/note/quantity controls/remove button/line total with touch targets ≥44px and visible focus states.
  - [x] For remove confirmation on quantity >1, use existing Radix/shadcn Dialog primitive from `shared/components/ui/dialog.tsx`; keep copy concise and Vietnamese.
  - [x] Keep CartPanel mounted in right POS aside; menu/grid interactions on the left must not unmount or reset cart.
- [x] Add DiscountControl + totals summary (AC: 6,7)
  - [x] Implement inside CartPanel or `features/orders/components/discount-control.tsx` if it keeps tests/readability cleaner.
  - [x] Validate integer input: fixed `0..subtotal`, percentage `0..100`; show helper/error text and avoid applying invalid values.
  - [x] Compute and display subtotal, discount amount when present, and total using pure integer math; `Math.floor(subtotal * percent / 100)` for percentage.
  - [x] Keep `Hoàn tất` button visible but disabled until Story 2.5 wires checkout/payment; do not implement payment/order building in this story.
- [x] Wire POS shell to real CartPanel (AC: 2-8)
  - [x] Replace the temporary right-panel item count/subtotal block in `pos-shell.tsx` with CartPanel.
  - [x] Preserve `ProductTile` behavior: products with options open OptionModal; products without options add snapshot item directly.
  - [x] Do not introduce backend API calls, Dexie writes for orders, payment method, receipt, sync engine, or checkout finalization.
- [x] Tests (AC: 1-10)
  - [x] Add focused unit tests for `cart-store.ts` covering merge, quantity, remove, note, discount validation/calculation helpers, clear/reset.
  - [x] Extend POS integration tests to verify empty state, add item from product grid/modal, line item display/options/note, quantity stepper, remove confirmation, discount fixed/percentage validation, and total updates.
  - [x] Test that rerendering/menu data changes do not clear existing cart snapshots.
  - [x] Run and record frontend gates plus security grep.

## Dev Notes

### Scope boundaries

- This story owns the **cart panel surface and in-memory cart state**: line item display/editing, quantity/remove, item note editing, cart-level discount, subtotal/discount/total display, and disabled checkout button placeholder.
- This story does **not** own payment method selection, local order code/UUID order building, Dexie pending order writes, order sync, receipt modal, backend order schema/API, void/cancel order, or Admin menu sync. Those begin in Stories 2.5+ and 2.6+.
- No backend changes are expected. If a backend edit appears necessary, treat it as suspicious and re-check story scope first.

### Current implementation state to preserve/read before coding

- `pos-web/src/features/orders/cart-store.ts` currently has only `items`, `addItem`, and `resetCart`. It appends a new `CartItem` with UUID v7 `tempId` and copies option snapshots. Story 2.4 must extend this store rather than create a competing cart state.
- `pos-web/src/features/orders/types.ts` currently defines `CartItem.quantity: 1`; this must become `number` for stepper behavior while preserving snapshot fields and VND integer totals.
- `pos-web/src/routes/pos/pos-shell.tsx` currently:
  - imports `useCartStore`, `OptionModal`, `ProductTile`, `useCategories`, `useProducts`, `EmptyState`, `Input`, and `formatVnd`;
  - handles product-with-options by opening OptionModal;
  - handles product-without-options by adding a snapshot item directly;
  - renders a temporary right cart placeholder with item count, subtotal, and latest item. Replace only that placeholder with real CartPanel.
- `pos-web/src/features/menu/components/option-modal.tsx` already passes `CartItemInput` to `onAddToCart`; preserve this contract unless a small compatible type adjustment is needed for `quantity: number`.
- `pos-web/src/routes/pos/pos-shell.test.tsx` already seeds fake IndexedDB and verifies modal/add-to-cart. Extend these tests instead of replacing the test harness.

### Architecture and guardrails

- Source of truth on conflict: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md` and `_bmad-output/project-context.md`.
- FE layering remains one-way: `routes/` may import `features/` and `shared/`; `features/orders` may import `shared/` and `db` if needed; `shared/` must not import `features/`, `routes/`, or `db`.
- Cart semantics belong in `features/orders` per current code and project structure. Component filenames kebab-case; React components PascalCase; Zustand actions camelCase verbs.
- VND money is integer only. Do not introduce decimal/floating currency display; percentage discount can use `Math.floor` on integer subtotal.
- Snapshot immutability is mandatory: display and calculations must use `productNameSnapshot`, `unitPriceSnapshot`, `labelSnapshot`, `priceDeltaSnapshot`. Do not refresh cart lines from current Dexie product/menu records.
- UUID rule already handled by Story 2.3 via `shared/lib/uuid.ts` and `uuid` v11 dependency. Do not replace it with `crypto.randomUUID()` or v4.
- Security regressions remain blockers: no token use in `localStorage`/`sessionStorage`, no `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`.

### UX/accessibility requirements

- CartPanel is fixed in the right POS panel for landscape/tablet/laptop; it must never disappear at the primary breakpoint.
- Empty state copy must be calm and actionable: `Chọn món để bắt đầu đơn.`
- Line items should be scannable under pressure: bold product name, compact option list, italic note, clear quantity controls, and line total aligned for fast checking.
- Quantity/remove/note/discount controls need ≥44px touch targets where practical, visible keyboard focus, and disabled/error states that do not rely only on color.
- Total label/amount should be the strongest visual element in the cart panel: 28-36px bold, VND formatted, no decimal.
- Confirmation dialog should be used for removing a multi-quantity line via X to avoid accidental full-line deletion; decrement button can simply reduce quantity down to min 1 and remove only through explicit remove flow.

### Previous story intelligence

- Story 2.3 implemented OptionModal/OptionChip and the minimal cart add seam. It added UUID v7 dependency/wrapper, `features/orders/cart-store.ts`, `features/orders/types.ts`, and POS test coverage.
- Story 2.3 review fixed three relevant issues: UUID v7 must come from `uuid` package v11; required option groups with unresolved options must keep Add CTA disabled; inactive cached option groups/options must be skipped.
- Story 2.2 product browsing and Story 2.1 Dexie menu sync established the POS shell, fake IndexedDB test harness, category/product hooks, and offline source-of-truth pattern. Do not bypass Dexie/menu hooks for product display.
- Recent commits: `0de7c45 feat(pos-web): add option modal cart flow`, `1f303d0 feat(pos): complete story 2-2 product browsing`, `959f343 feat: complete story 2-1 menu sync`. Current story should build on those files, not re-platform the POS route.

### File structure guidance

Expected files to add/update:

```text
pos-web/src/
├── routes/pos/
│   ├── pos-shell.tsx                 # UPDATE replace right placeholder with CartPanel wiring
│   └── pos-shell.test.tsx            # UPDATE POS/cart integration coverage
├── features/orders/
│   ├── cart-store.ts                 # UPDATE full cart actions + discount state
│   ├── cart-store.test.ts            # NEW focused Zustand store tests
│   ├── types.ts                      # UPDATE CartItem quantity number + CartDiscount
│   └── components/
│       ├── cart-panel.tsx            # NEW line items, empty state, totals, disabled checkout
│       └── discount-control.tsx      # NEW optional split if useful
└── shared/components/ui/
    ├── button.tsx                    # existing; reuse
    ├── input.tsx                     # existing; reuse
    └── dialog.tsx                    # existing; reuse for confirm dialog
```

### Testing Standards

- Use Vitest + React Testing Library.
- For store tests, reset Zustand state between tests; assert state and computed totals deterministically without relying on component rendering.
- For POS integration, keep fake IndexedDB/Dexie seeding patterns already in `pos-shell.test.tsx`; use user-event for quantity/note/discount interactions.
- Required command set:

```bash
cd pos-web && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
```

- Regression scan command suggestion:

```bash
grep -R "localStorage\|sessionStorage\|dangerouslySetInnerHTML" -n pos-web/src --exclude='*.test.ts' --exclude='*.test.tsx'
```

### Debug Log References

- `grep -R "localStorage\|sessionStorage\|dangerouslySetInnerHTML" -n src --exclude='*.test.ts' --exclude='*.test.tsx'` — no matches (grep exit 1 means none found).

### Completion Notes List

- Extended in-memory cart store with item merge semantics, quantity/remove/note actions, cart-level discount state, subtotal/discount/total helpers, and safe clear/reset behavior.
- Added fixed right CartPanel with empty state copy, line item display, note editor, quantity stepper, multi-quantity remove confirmation, disabled `Hoàn tất`, and integer VND totals.
- Added DiscountControl with integer-only fixed/percentage validation, explicit helper/error text, discount removal, and instant total recalculation.
- Preserved POS product browsing, category/search, OptionModal add-to-cart flow, UUID v7 temp IDs, and snapshot-based cart display/calculation without backend/Dexie order writes.
- Added store unit tests and POS integration coverage for empty cart, add item, line display, quantity, note, discount, remove confirmation, and snapshot safety.
